$comment: FR-DS-001 mood board reference catalog. Each entry has a take-this-not-that annotation per AC#4. Designer adds image_url + thumbnail as references are sourced.

A-saigon-dusk-palette.description: Photographic anchors for warm-brown + saffron-gold in real Vietnamese context

references.title: Bát Tràng pottery glaze close-up
references.search_term: Bát Tràng pottery brown gold glaze close-up
references.annotation: Take the warm-brown + gold-edge transition; not the pattern motifs

references.title: Sơn mài lacquerware with gold leaf
references.search_term: Vietnamese sơn mài lacquerware gold leaf brown
references.annotation: Take the gold-on-warm-brown texture relationship; not the figurative subjects

references.title: Vietnamese cà phê đen via phin
references.search_term: Vietnamese coffee phin drip cà phê đen close-up
references.annotation: Take the deep brown + the warm rim-light; not the cup or filter as objects

references.title: Saigon street at golden hour (not tourist landmark)
references.search_term: Saigon District 1 alleyway golden hour street
references.annotation: Take the ambient warm-light wash across surfaces; not the people or signage

references.title: Áo dài in saffron / temple-saffron silk against warm wood
references.search_term: saffron silk áo dài warm wood interior
references.annotation: Take the silk-on-wood material relationship; not the garment as costume

B-vietnamese-material-register.description: Texture references signalling materiality without iconography

references.title: Giấy dó (handmade Vietnamese paper) close-up
references.search_term: giấy dó handmade Vietnamese paper texture
references.annotation: Take the fibre texture + warm tone; not as a calligraphy substrate

references.title: Woven bamboo / rattan chair seat
references.search_term: woven bamboo rattan chair texture neutral
references.annotation: Take the weave pattern as material; never as a tourist hat reference

references.title: Raw silk in natural dye
references.search_term: raw Vietnamese silk natural dye texture
references.annotation: Take the silk gloss + dye irregularity; subtle, not loud

C-cinematic-web.description: Award-winning sites for composition + craft only — palette stays ours

references.title: Igloo Inc. abeto (Awwwards SOTY 2024)
references.annotation: REQUIRED reference. Take the hybrid scroll + 3D with frictionless nav pattern. NOT the cool-tone palette.

references.title: Lusion v3 (Awwwards SOTY 2023)
references.annotation: REQUIRED reference. Take the baked-asset craft + studio-website-as-portfolio confidence. NOT the dense shader complexity.

references.title: Immersive Garden V4 (or 14islands V4 / Active Theory The Field)
references.annotation: REQUIRED — pick ONE. Take the gltf-Transform automation / progressive-enhancement WebGL pattern. NOT the editorial density (we're services, not creative-industry).

D-mascots-b2b.description: Mascots that maintain professional warmth — anti-twee

references.title: Messenger SOTY 2025 character
references.annotation: REQUIRED. Take the proof that 'cute character with a job' can win SOTY at services-brand register.

references.title: Linear circles / Notion icons / Mailchimp Freddie
references.annotation: Pick ONE. Take minimal-professional mascot register. NOT cartoonish.

counter_examples.title: Tourist-Vietnamese composition (áo dài model + temple, golden hour)
counter_examples.annotation: AVOID. Leads with heritage / exoticism / tourism, none of which match the brand register. Modern, casual Vietnamese is the register; ceremonial is not.

counter_examples.title: Cool-toned SaaS landing page (cyan-on-navy)
counter_examples.annotation: AVOID. Indistinguishable from FPT pricing tier; defeats the Saigon Dusk thesis. Master plan §3.2 mandates warm-only.

counter_examples.title: Cost-led outsourcing imagery (price comparison, world map with rates)
counter_examples.annotation: AVOID. Master plan §1.4: 'do NOT lead with cost.' Vietnamese-outsourcing trope is the exact register we differentiate from.
